description: Programming language identification -- given a short code snippet, identify the language.

examples.snippet:
SELECT e.name, d.department_name
FROM employees e
JOIN departments d ON e.dept_id = d.id
WHERE e.salary > 50000
ORDER BY e.name;

defmodule Math do
  def factorial(0), do: 1
  def factorial(n) when n > 0 do
    n * factorial(n - 1)
  end
end

main :: IO ()
main = do
    let xs = [1..10]
    print (filter even xs)

#!/bin/bash
for f in *.txt; do
    wc -l "$f"
done | sort -n
